name: Acelon Chemicals & Fiber Corporation
summary: Acelon Chemicals & Fiber Corporation manufactures and sells textile products in Taiwan. The company offers filament yarns, including nylon, polyester, dope dyed, nylon/polyester conjugate, cool, quick dry, stock, and m√É¬©lange yarns; and functional fabrics, such as aceice, acestatic, acecool, acebamboo, and acemicro. It also provides finished products, which includes household and personal cleaning products; sport, cool, and yoga towels; and T-shirts, polo shirts, uniforms, and sunscreen jackets. Acelon Chemicals & Fiber Corporation was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Changhua, Taiwan.
